verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I left the barren land I was searching for rest Stumbling'round in amnesia, Bitterness and distress But then I met the Kinsman Redeemer Who's called the Mighty One He took this old Moabite From the field To bring me to His house

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: He said, "Fear not My child For you are a part of me and I'll not rest 'Til you are at My side I will do all that you ask of Me You're a jewel in My eyes, Virtuous woman, You are My Bride."

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: When I look back and see How much grace and love You showed me Lord it brings me to my knees That You could even think about me (When I'm need) You're still Jehovah-Jireh (Jehovah-Raphah) You're still the Great Healer With faith I'll stand on Your Word 'Cause You're more than able

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: He said, "Fear not My child For you are part of me and I'll not rest 'Til you are at My side I will do all that you ask of Me You're a jewel in My eyes, Virtuous woman, You are My Bride."

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: So, Lord, I'm casting all my cares on You I know You love me Redemption by Blood That's the greatest love story Full restoration, full redemption That's what the seventh angel in a cloud That's what they testify "My Redeemer's no longer dead But He's risen and He's coming back for you and me."
